name: My Super Tiny Market
author: Poki
description: Run the ultimate supermarket in My Super Tiny Market! In this management simulation game, you'll have to help all the customers that come up by scanning their products and giving them the correct amount of change. By helping your customers well, you can unlock new items to sell, such as sandwiches, sushi, soda and more! Get out there and make your customers happy! How to play My Super Tiny Market? Use the mouse to scan the products and handle the money! Who created My Super Tiny Market? My Super Tiny Market was created by Dinobros. Play their other games on Poki: goal-training and Sticker Album ! How can I play My Super Tiny Market for free? You can play My Super Tiny Market for free on Poki. Can I play My Super Tiny Market on mobile devices and desktop? My Super Tiny Market can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
